description_for_human: The spend firewall for autonomous AI agents. Evaluates every transaction against your rules and returns approve, block, or flag before any money moves.
description_for_model: Call before an autonomous agent spends money. POST /v1/transactions/evaluate with {amount, merchant, category} returns {decision: APPROVED|BLOCKED|FLAGGED, reason}. Enforces per-transaction caps, daily totals, velocity (runaway-loop protection), merchant allow/block, category limits, and time windows.
